claim: This Labs adapter shell is not Stable and makes no editing, screen-reader, mobile, serialization, sanitization, package-parity, or manual assistive-technology conformance claim for an adapter engine.

semantics.nativeBasis: Mergora provides labelled shell, error, form serialization, optional toolbar boundary, details, and status; all editing semantics come from the required adapter.
semantics.naming: Label and description ids are supplied to the adapter; exact adapter id/version can be visibly exposed.
semantics.roleOverride: Mergora adds no contenteditable role, document model, fake toolbar behavior, or editor engine.

interaction.keyboard: Adapter owns complete editing, selection, history, toolbar, shortcut, and focus behavior.
interaction.pointer: Adapter owns selection and object manipulation; shell adds no gesture.
interaction.touch: Adapter owns virtual-keyboard, mobile selection, and touch affordances.
interaction.speech: Visible shell label and adapter controls must form speech targets.
interaction.switchAccess: Adapter must document scan order and non-gesture alternatives before promotion.

formBehavior: Optional name serializes the exact adapter value in a hidden input and reset restores defaultValue; the adapter owns document schema and migration.

preferences.forcedColors: Shell, boundaries, status, serialization, errors, and focus mappings are preserved; adapter content requires independent proof.
preferences.reducedMotion: Shell motion is removed; adapter motion requires independent review.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Shell is bounded; adapter reflow and virtual-keyboard behavior remain unproven Labs obligations.

consumerResponsibilities: Integrate a maintained, licensed, pinned editor engine and publish its exact document schema, serialization, migrations, security policy, and dependency health.
Sanitize untrusted import/export and URL/media output under the application threat model.
Complete editor-specific desktop/mobile AT, screen-reader reading/editing modes, IME, voice, switch, touch, zoom, and data-loss testing.
limitations: This source is only a Labs integration shell; it intentionally contains no editor engine.
No adapter has earned the complete editing, screen-reader, mobile, serialization, security, lifecycle, or manual contract required for promotion.
